name: Risotto Col Frutti Di Mare

ingredients.item: seafood mix, shrimp, calamari, and scallops, rinsed well.

method: In a frying pan on medium heat, melt butter and add seafood. Cook about half way and remove from heat. Set seafood aside.

In a frying pan on medium heat, add 2 T olive oil,add onion, and saute until transparent. Add arborio rice and saute until slightly golden. Add white wine and let and the liquid reduce, then add 2 T tomato paste and little tomatoes. Now, add the broth slowly, a little at a time, as the liquid absorbs add more, stirrings periodically so the rice doesn't stick. Arborio rice is done when it is cooked al dente. At the end of your cooking time, add seafood, minced garlic, and chopped parsley, and cook the seafood the rest of the way. Don't cook it too much because seafood becomes rubbery if overcooked. Leo wanted me to add that you shouldn't garnish pasta seafood dishes with grated cheese. Serve with parsley garnish. Serving suggestion: fresh bread and salad. Serves 2-3. Olé
